---
title: "Hands-on Exercise 1"
author: "HTC"
date: "September 1, 2025"
date-modified: "last-modified"
format:
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: true
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

# Overview

This is hands-on Exercise 1

## Getting started

```{r}
pacman::p_load(sf, tidyverse, dplyr, units)
```

```{r}
mpsz = st_read(dsn = "data/geospatial/MasterPlan2014SubzoneBoundaryWebSHP", 
                  layer = "MP14_SUBZONE_WEB_PL")


```

```{r}
cyclingpath = st_read(dsn = "data/geospatial/CyclingPath_Apr2025", 
                         layer = "CyclingPathGazette")

```

```{r}
preschool = st_read("data/geospatial/PreSchoolsLocation.kml")

```

```{r}
st_geometry(mpsz)
```

```{r}
glimpse(mpsz)
```

```{r}
head(mpsz, n=5)  
```

```{r}
plot(mpsz)
```

```{r}
plot(st_geometry(mpsz))
```

```{r}
plot(mpsz["PLN_AREA_N"])
```

```{r}
plot(st_geometry(mpsz))
plot(st_geometry(preschool), 
     add = TRUE)
```

```{r}
st_crs(mpsz)
```

```{r}
mpsz <- st_set_crs(mpsz, 3414)
```

```{r}
st_crs(mpsz)
```

```{r}
preschool <- st_transform(preschool, 
                              crs = 3414)
```

```{r}
plot(st_geometry(mpsz))
plot(st_geometry(preschool), add = TRUE)
```

```{r}
listings <- read_csv("data/aspatial/listings.csv")
```

```{r}
list(listings) 
```

```{r}
listings_sf <- st_as_sf(listings, 
                       coords = c("longitude", "latitude"),
                       crs=4326) %>%
  st_transform(crs = 3414)
```

```{r}
glimpse(listings_sf)
```

```{r}
plot(st_geometry(mpsz))
plot(st_geometry(listings_sf), add = TRUE)
```

```         
#case 1: Land acquisition analysis
```

```{r}
cyclingpath <- cyclingpath |> st_make_valid() |> st_transform(3414)
mpsz        <- mpsz        |> st_make_valid() |> st_transform(3414)
```

```{r}

```

```{r}
buffer_cycling <- st_buffer(
  cyclingpath, dist=5, nQuadSegs = 30)
```

```{r}
buffer_cycling$AREA <- st_area(buffer_cycling)
```

```{r}
buffer_cycling <- buffer_cycling %>%
  mutate(AREA = st_area(geometry))
```

```{r}
sum(buffer_cycling$AREA)
```

```{r}
mpsz_selected <- mpsz %>%
  filter(SUBZONE_N == "TAMPINES WEST") 
```

```{r}
buffer_cycling_selected <- st_intersection(buffer_cycling, mpsz_selected)
```

```{r}
plot(buffer_cycling_selected)
```

```{r}
# Use case 2: To determine the number of pre-schools by planning subzone
```

```{r}
mpsz$Area <- as.numeric(st_area(mpsz))
```

```{r}

```

```{r}
mpsz$`PreSch Count`<- lengths(st_intersects(mpsz, preschool))
```

```{r}
summary(mpsz$`PreSch Count`)

```

```{r}
top_n(mpsz, 1, `PreSch Count`)
```

```{r}
mpsz$Area <- mpsz %>%
  st_area()
```

```{r}
mpsz <- mpsz %>%
  mutate(`PreSch Density` = `PreSch Count`/Area * 1000000)
```

```{r}
hist(as.numeric(mpsz$`PreSch Density`))
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=mpsz, 
       aes(x= as.numeric(`PreSch Density`)))+
  geom_histogram(bins=20, 
                 color="black", 
                 fill="light blue") +
  labs(title = "Are pre-school even distributed in Singapore?",
       subtitle= "There are many planning subzones with a single pre-school, on the other hand, \nthere are seven planning subzones with at least 30 or more pre-schools",
      x = "Pre-school density (per km sq)",
      y = "Frequency")
```

```{r}
ggplot(data=mpsz, 
       aes(y = `PreSch Count`, 
           x= as.numeric(`PreSch Density`)))+
  geom_point(color="black", 
             fill="light blue") +
  xlim(0, 40) +
  ylim(0, 40) +
  labs(title = "",
      x = "Pre-school density (per km sq)",
      y = "Pre-school count")
```

## \### Importing data

elcome to ISSS626 Geospatial Analytics and Application

Coursework website

![](images/image_ex1.webp)
